warmup.name: A-skip
warmup.body: A bouncy skip where you drive one knee up to hip height while the opposite arm comes up. Stay light and springy on your toes.
warmup.cap: head up, knees up, arms drive

warmup.name: B-skip
warmup.body: builds on the basic A-skip but adds an exaggerated "pawing" leg cycle. To execute it, you hop forward, drive your knee up, kick the lower leg out, and actively snap your foot back down beneath your hips

warmup.name: High knees
warmup.body: Quick steps on your toes, driving the knees up high and fast. Stay tall and pump the arms to match the legs.

warmup.name: Build-up strides
warmup.body: Over 30 m, start easy and smoothly build to about 90 percent by the end, then ease off. Get's you ready to sprint hard.

s1.name: Wall drive holds
s1.body: Lean against a wall or fence at an angle, arms straight. Drive one knee up and hold 3 seconds. Teaches the body position you want when accelerating. Swap legs.

s1.name: High Knees to Run
s1.body: High knees for the first 10 m, then smoothly speed into a run for the last 10 m. Drive the knees, pump the arms.

s1.name: Push-up start sprints
s1.body: Lie face down. Pop up and sprint hard for 15 m. Starting low forces you to drive forward, not stand straight up.

s1.name: Falling start sprints
s1.body: Stand tall, lean forward until you have to catch yourself, then sprint 20 m. Push the ground away HARD with your first 5 steps.

s2a.name: Flying sprints
s2a.body: Jog 10 m to build up, then sprint at FULL speed for 20 m, then ease down. Because you're already moving you hit a higher top speed safely.

s2b.name: Ladder feet (cones)
s2b.body: Put 6 cones in a line, a foot apart. Run through with quick small steps, two feet between each cone. Quick and light, like the ground is hot.

s2b.name: Z-run
s2b.body: Set 4 cones in a zig-zag, ~5 m apart. Sprint to each, plant the outside foot and cut sharply to the next. Stay low through the turn.

s2b.name: Mirror steps (solo)
s2b.body: Imagine a defender. Sprint 5 m, sharp side-step left, sprint again, side-step right. Sell the step, drop your hips and push hard off the outside foot.

activate.callout: Start on World Rugby Document Phase 1 & 2 for the first few weeks.
